name: chrome-tab-triage-fragment
description: Lists open Chrome tabs, uses LLM to propose cleanup (duplicates, stale tabs, grouping suggestions), and delivers the result as a desktop notification. Optional context var: application (default: Google Chrome).

params.instruction: You are a tab hygiene assistant. Given this list of open browser tabs, identify: (1) duplicate or near-duplicate URLs, (2) tabs that look stale or unrelated to active work, (3) suggested groupings. Be concise — one line per finding. Max 5 bullet points.
